acquisition method: Data were collected on an Orbitrap Elite (Thermo-Fisher Scientific) in Data Dependent Acquisition mode
alkylation reagent: Iodoacetamide was then added to 55 mM to alkylate thiol groups
alkylation concentration: Iodoacetamide was then added to 55 mM to alkylate thiol groups
cleavage agent: sequencing grade trypsin (Promega) was added to 5 μM final concentration
collision energy: CID at 35% energy for a maximum injection time of 150 ms
fragmentation method: CID MS/MS spectra were collected for the 20 most intense ions
instrument: Data were collected on an Orbitrap Elite (Thermo-Fisher Scientific)
ionization type: Peptides (2 μL) were diluted to 30 μL in 0.1% trifluroacetic acid and 2% acetonitrile (buffer A)
labeling: a systems biology approach comprising genome analysis, transcriptomics and label-free quantitative proteomics
